} } foreach $list (values %$late) { @$list = map { submToEntry($_) } sort SubmissionOrder @$list; } return $late; } # Usage: submToEntry SUBMFILENAME # Given a submission file name (of a file under SUBMISSION_DIR), return #

ors, or is ungraded. sub submToEntry { my $subm = shift; if (my ($assgn, $basename, $timestamp) = ($subm =~ m{ .*/(.*)/([-a-zA-Z0-9_.]+\.([0-9]+))$ }x)) { if (-e "$LOG_DIR/$assgn/ok/$basename") { $suffix = "S";
/ok/$basename") { $suffix = "S"; } elsif (-e "$LOG_DIR/$assgn/failed/$basename") { $suffix = "F"; } else { $suffix = "?"; } return $timestamp . $suffix; } else { return "

for LOGIN, adjusted by exceptions, if applicable. If $$WAIVE > 0, # reduce any positive lateness by up to that amount, reducing $$WAIVE # accordingly. sub lateness { my ($assgn, $login, $time, $waive) = @_; my $key = "$assgn/$login";

e, $waive) = @_; my $key = "$assgn/$login"; my $lateness = ($time - ($deadlineException{"$assgn/$login"} || $due{$assgn})) / 3600; if ($$waive > 0 and $lateness > 0) { my $waiver = $$waive > $lateness ? $lateness : $$waive; $$wa

= $$waive > $lateness ? $lateness : $$waive; $$waive -= $waiver; $lateness -= $waiver; } return $lateness; } # Usage: allLogins %LATEREPORTS # Given a hash mapping assignment names to late reports (see # readTimesForAssign, retur

o late reports (see # readTimesForAssign, return a sorted list of all logins mentioned in # any of the reports. sub allLogins { my $reports = shift; my (%logins, $rpt, $login); foreach $rpt (values %$reports) { foreach $login (keys

ch $rpt (values %$reports) { foreach $login (keys %$rpt) { $logins{$login} = 1; } } return sort (keys %logins); } %printed_type = ( "S" => "+", "F" => "-", "?" => "" ); # Usage: report_a \%LATEREPORTS \@ASSGNS $OPTION # Given a has

"%s%s (+%3.1f)", formatTime ($time), $printed_type{$type}, $lateness; } else { printf STDOUT "%s%s", formatTime ($time), $printed_type{$type}; } } } if (! $first) { print STDOUT "\n";
